name: @agentinvest/operator-ui
description: agentINVEST Operator UI v0.1 (thin slice) — a Next.js + Tailwind operator console for the two load-bearing surfaces: the Approvals queue (list + approve/reject the high-stakes gate's pending approvals) and the Operations dashboard (read-only: in-flight + completed operations + the operation-closed audit records). Server-side fetch from the local Restate admin + ingress; no app-layer auth (v0.1 single-operator, network-ACL at deploy); synthetic data; workstation-local.
